block.text: It takes one combat turn to change forms. During that turn, the robot makes its normal combat roll, but if it wins, it does no damage to the foe — it just defends itself. The shield does not protect it on this 168 You continue on your way towards Hall Beta and the military exhibition. When you arrive, it proves to be ancient history. The strange sounds from the building are making you nervous. and you have no desire to read about catapults and other ancient devices. You go back to the main desk. Return to 14.
